hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】随着交易员在通胀报告发布前提高美联储 7 月加息押注，比特币下跌；【FINANCE】沃勒表示美联储不应该打关于通胀的“最后一场战争”，但警告称仍有可能加息；【CRYPTO】瑞穗表示 Circle 银行的批准并不能解决 USDC 增长和稳定币竞争风险。

items.title: Bitcoin slips as traders lift July Fed rate hike bets ahead of Inflation report
items.summary: Major cryptocurrencies have dropped by 2% or more in 24 hours as traders boosted bets of a July Fed rate hike.
items.title_zh: 随着交易员在通胀报告发布前提高美联储 7 月加息押注，比特币下跌
items.summary_zh: 由于交易员加大了对美联储 7 月加息的押注，主要加密货币在 24 小时内下跌了 2% 或更多。

items.title: Waller says Fed shouldn't 'fight the last war' on inflation but warns hikes still possible
items.summary: The Fed governor said inflation has expanded beyond the often-cited drivers such as the energy price spike in tariffs.
items.title_zh: 沃勒表示美联储不应该打关于通胀的“最后一场战争”，但警告称仍有可能加息
items.summary_zh: 美联储理事表示，通胀已超出能源价格飙升等经常被提及的驱动因素。

items.title: Mizuho says Circle bank approval doesn't solve USDC growth, stablecoin competition risks
items.summary: Japanese investment bank Mizuho reiterated its neutral rating on Circle, saying OCC approval for a national trust bank doesn't address slowing USDC growth or rising competition.
items.title_zh: 瑞穗表示 Circle 银行的批准并不能解决 USDC 增长和稳定币竞争风险
items.summary_zh: 日本投资银行瑞穗重申了对 Circle 的中性评级，称 OCC 对国家信托银行的批准并不能解决 USDC 增长放缓或竞争加剧的问题。

items.title: A July rate hike from the Fed? The odds are rising
items.summary: Chances of a rate hike in July by the Federal Reserve rose as oil prices jumped on the latest developments in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 美联储7月加息？几率正在上升
items.summary_zh: 随着霍尔木兹海峡的最新事态发展，油价上涨，美联储 7 月加息的可能性上升。

items.title: Big banks poised to report booming revenue propelled by SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility
items.summary: Big banks are set to report booming Q2 revenue as the SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility and a rebound in commercial lending fuel Wall Street's "sweet spot."
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股和伊朗战争波动推动大型银行营收大幅增长
items.summary_zh: 随着 SpaceX 首次公开募股、伊朗战争波动和商业贷款反弹推动华尔街的“最佳点”，大型银行将报告第二季度收入蓬勃发展。

items.title: Kevin Warsh names members of his Federal Reserve task forces, including Marc Andreessen, Doug McMillon
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh on Thursday released names of the experts who will comprise five task forces to examine the institution's operations.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 任命了美联储特别工作组成员，其中包括马克·安德森 (Marc Andreessen)、道格·麦克米伦 (Doug McMillon)
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席凯文·沃什周四公布了专家名单，这些专家将组成五个工作组来检查该机构的运作。

items.title: Lebanese Hold Fast to Their Land Despite Threat of Long Israeli Occupation
items.summary: Entire towns in southern Lebanon have been hollowed out by the war between Israel and Hezbollah. Some residents have stayed, fearing permanent displacement.
items.title_zh: 尽管面临以色列长期占领的威胁，黎巴嫩人仍坚守自己的土地
items.summary_zh: 以色列和真主党之间的战争使黎巴嫩南部的整个城镇被掏空。一些居民因担心永久流离失所而留下来。

items.title: New method aims to keep kids safe from illegal AI-generated content
items.summary: Researchers developed an auditing technique to test generative AI models for malicious capabilities, without prompting them for illegal outputs.
items.title_zh: 新方法旨在保护孩子免受非法人工智能生成内容的侵害
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种审计技术来测试生成人工智能模型的恶意功能，而不提示它们进行非法输出。

items.title: Solo bitcoin miner makes $200,000 using $150 equipment
items.summary: Solo Bitcoin mining has surged, with 24 blocks found in the past 12 months, a 41% increase year over year.
items.title_zh: 比特币矿工使用 150 美元的设备赚了 20 万美元
items.summary_zh: 比特币单独挖矿量激增，过去 12 个月内发现了 24 个区块，同比增长 41%。

items.title: Bitcoin panic-selling may be ending as sellers' profit margins disappear
items.summary: Analysts point to bitcoin’s resilience amid fresh U.S.-Iran escalation and renewed spot ETF inflows as the clearest signs yet that the marginal seller has stepped away.
items.title_zh: 随着卖家利润率消失，比特币恐慌性抛售可能会结束
items.summary_zh: 分析师指出，在美国与伊朗之间的紧张局势升级和现货 ETF 资金重新流入的情况下，比特币的韧性是迄今为止最明显的迹象，表明边际卖家已经退出。

items.title: Strategy pauses its Bitcoin buying spree to hoard a massive $3 billion cash cushion
items.summary: Strategy now has more than 20 months of coverage for preferred-stock dividends and debt interest.
items.title_zh: Strategy 暂停比特币购买热潮，以囤积 30 亿美元的巨额现金缓冲
items.summary_zh: Strategy 目前拥有超过 20 个月的优先股股息和债务利息保障。

items.title: How Bitcoin ETFs Changed Institutional Adoption
items.summary: A spot bitcoin ETF is a fund that holds actual bitcoin and trades on a stock exchange, so an investor gains exposure to bitcoin’s price through an ordinary brokerage account. When the first U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs began trading in January 2024, they removed the custody, compliance
items.title_zh: 比特币 ETF 如何改变机构采用
items.summary_zh: 现货比特币 ETF 是一种持有实际比特币并在证券交易所进行交易的基金，因此投资者可以通过普通经纪账户获得比特币价格的敞口。当美国第一批现货比特币 ETF 于 2024 年 1 月开始交易时，他们取消了托管、合规

items.title: Strategy’s no-bitcoin-buy week shows ‘greater balance-sheet discipline,’ analysts say
items.summary: Analysts from Benchmark and TD Cowen maintained Buy ratings and price targets of $570 and $260, respectively.
items.title_zh: 分析师表示，Strategy 本周没有购买比特币，这表明“资产负债表纪律更加严格”
items.summary_zh: Benchmark 和 TD Cowen 的分析师分别维持买入评级和 570 美元和 260 美元的目标价。

items.title: Tiny robot boats build floating structures
items.summary: MIT researchers developed FloatForm, a swarm of small aquatic robots that snap together like ants forming a raft, assembling into reconfigurable structures on the water.
items.title_zh: 微型机器人船建造浮动结构
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了 FloatForm，这是一群小型水生机器人，它们像蚂蚁形成木筏一样聚集在一起，在水上组装成可重新配置的结构。

items.title: How novice coders can develop AI programs for military applications
items.summary: A USAF cadet and a Lincoln Laboratory researcher found AI chatbots can help nontechnical service members produce viable software applications for their unique problems.
items.title_zh: 新手程序员如何开发军事应用的人工智能程序
items.summary_zh: 一名美国空军学员和一名林肯实验室研究人员发现，人工智能聊天机器人可以帮助非技术服务人员针对其独特问题开发可行的软件应用程序。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: These underperforming trades could yield big returns over next six months
items.summary: ETF Action's Mike Akins is encouraging investors to boost exposure to groups that underperformed compared with major artificial intelligence stocks.
items.title_zh: 这些表现不佳的交易可能会在未来六个月内产生丰厚回报
items.summary_zh: ETF Action 的迈克·阿金斯 (Mike Akins) 鼓励投资者增加对那些与主要人工智能股票相比表现不佳的股票的投资。

items.title: Death toll from Bangkok bar fire rises to 30 as police probe safety lapses
items.summary: Survivors and first reporters reported doors being locked and the lack of signage marking emergency exits.
items.title_zh: 警方调查安全失误，曼谷酒吧火灾死亡人数上升至30人
items.summary_zh: 幸存者和第一批记者报告说，门被锁住，并且没有标记紧急出口的标志。

items.title: How US commerce secretary's Epstein links were uncovered by British whistleblower
items.summary: Simon Andriesz made the discovery about Howard Lutnick in publicly released Epstein files.
items.title_zh: 英国举报人如何揭露美国商务部长与爱泼斯坦的联系
items.summary_zh: 西蒙·安德里斯 (Simon Andriesz) 在公开发布的爱泼斯坦文件中发现了霍华德·卢特尼克 (Howard Lutnick)。

items.title: Japan Builds Intelligence Agency It Hasn’t Had Since World War II
items.summary: Facing threats from Russia and China, Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is turning to help from Western allies in forming a centralized agency.
items.title_zh: 日本建立二战以来从未有过的情报机构
items.summary_zh: 面对俄罗斯和中国的威胁，日本首相高市早苗正在寻求西方盟友的帮助，以组建一个中央机构。

items.title: The Next Phase in Ukraine’s War With Russia: The Battle for Minds
items.summary: Ukrainians, already drone innovators, are turning their focus to psychological operations aimed at undercutting Russian support for the war.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰与俄罗斯战争的下一阶段：思想之战
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰人已经是无人机创新者，他们正在将注意力转向旨在削弱俄罗斯对战争支持的心理行动。

items.title: A Robot Army Remakes Ground Warfare in Ukraine
items.summary: They began as supply mules. Now ground robots evacuate the wounded, hold trenches and even do the killing.
items.title_zh: 机器人军队重塑乌克兰地面战
items.summary_zh: 他们最初是作为补给骡子。现在，地面机器人可以疏散伤员、守卫战壕，甚至进行杀戮。

items.title: Hard-Liners in Iran Want to Keep Fighting America
items.summary: With much of their leadership killed in the war, Iran’s conservatives have sought to fill the void and intensify the fight against the United States.
items.title_zh: 伊朗强硬派希望继续与美国作战
items.summary_zh: 由于伊朗的许多领导人在战争中丧生，伊朗保守派一直在寻求填补空白并加大对美国的打击力度。

items.title: Trump's crypto riches loom over Clarity Act talks to ban conflicts for U.S. officials
items.summary: Discussion among Democrats have fixed on the president's personal gains when hashing out the crypto market structure bill's ethics provision.
items.title_zh: 特朗普的加密货币财富笼罩着禁止美国官员冲突的《澄清法案》谈判
items.summary_zh: 在讨论加密货币市场结构法案的道德条款时，民主党人的讨论集中在总统的个人利益上。

items.title: Bitcoin and Ethereum tweet volume falls to 12-month lows despite institutional crypto boom
items.summary: Retail attention via social chatter is back to 2020 levels even as institutional involvement has moved in the opposite direction.
items.title_zh: 尽管机构加密货币繁荣，但比特币和以太坊推文数量跌至 12 个月低点
items.summary_zh: 尽管机构参与朝着相反的方向发展，但社交媒体上的散户关注度已回到 2020 年的水平。

items.title: Hyperliquid’s HIP-3 markets surge to nearly 50% of perp volume as onchain stock trading grows
items.summary: HIP-3's share of total Hyperliquid perp volume has climbed from roughly 2% at the start of the year to around 50% now.
items.title_zh: 随着链上股票交易的增长，Hyperliquid 的 HIP-3 市场激增至永久交易量的近 50%
items.summary_zh: HIP-3 在 Hyperliquid Perp 总销量中的份额已从年初的约 2% 攀升至目前的 50% 左右。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: Toward a future that preserves benefits of neurotechnology for all
items.summary: PhD student Rachel Sava, winner of the Envisioning the Future of Computing Prize, explores transformative improvements and dystopian risks of neural technology.
items.title_zh: 迈向一个让所有人都能受益于神经技术的未来
items.summary_zh: 博士生 Rachel Sava 是“展望计算未来”奖的获得者，她探索了神经技术的变革性改进和反乌托邦风险。

items.title: 'Listing is a must': Chinese humanoid startups are rushing to launch IPOs
items.summary: Shenzhen-based LimX Dynamics is the latest humanoid company in China to raise capital in recent weeks as investors eye IPO exits.
items.title_zh: “上市是必须的”：中国仿人初创公司正争先恐后地进行首次公开​​募股
items.summary_zh: 随着投资者关注 IPO 退出，总部位于深圳的 LimX Dynamics 是最近几周在中国筹集资金的最新一家人形公司。

items.title: Kalshi launches 'Pro' product for users trading multiple markets at same time, perpetual futures
items.summary: The platform is designed to alleviate problems the company's most active traders have run into, according to a memo provided to CNBC.
items.title_zh: Kalshi 为同时交易多个市场的用户推出“Pro”产品永续期货
items.summary_zh: 根据 CNBC 提供的一份备忘录，该平台旨在缓解该公司最活跃的交易员遇到的问题。

items.title: UAE condemns Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers as US launches fresh strikes
items.summary: The third consecutive night of US strikes on Iran came as Trump announced a 20% charge as part of a new blockade on the Strait of Hormuz.

items.summary_zh: 美国连续第三晚对伊朗发动打击，此时特朗普宣布对伊朗进行 20% 的打击，作为霍尔木兹海峡新封锁的一部分。

items.title: Live Updates: U.S. Strikes Iran for 3rd Night, in Return to Open Conflict
items.summary: President Trump announced a 20 percent fee on cargo shipped through the Strait of Hormuz. Iran said it had attacked two tankers transiting the waterway as the battle to control it intensified.
items.title_zh: 实时更新：美国第三晚袭击伊朗，以回应公开冲突
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统宣布对通过霍尔木兹海峡运输的货物征收 20% 的费用。伊朗表示，随着控制该水道的战斗加剧，它袭击了两艘通过该水道的油轮。

items.summary: TeraWulf says its $19 billion AI hosting agreement with Anthropic underscores its transformation from a Bitcoin miner into an AI infrastructure company.
items.title_zh: TeraWulf 首席执行官：人工智能竞赛中“并非所有兆瓦都是平等产生的”
items.summary_zh: TeraWulf 表示，其与 Anthropic 达成的价值 190 亿美元的人工智能托管协议凸显了其从比特币矿工向人工智能基础设施公司的转型。

items.title: Gondor v1 to let users borrow against their entire Polymarket portfolio
items.summary: Expected to launch in September, v1 will enable users to margin their entire Polymarket portfolios to place additional leveraged bets.
items.title_zh: Gondor v1 让用户可以以其整个 Polymarket 投资组合进行借贷
items.summary_zh: v1 预计于 9 月推出，用户可以使用其整个 Polymarket 投资组合进行保证金，以进行额外的杠杆投注。

items.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.summary: Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.

items.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Jesse Thaler named director of the Laboratory for Nuclear Science
items.summary: The professor of physics and inaugural director of the NSF AI Institute for Artificial Intelligence and Fundamental Interactions will lead LNS and continue his research in particle physics.
items.title_zh: 杰西·泰勒被任命为核科学实验室主任
items.summary_zh: 这位物理学教授兼 NSF AI 人工智能和基础相互作用研究所首任所长将领导 LNS 并继续他在粒子物理学方面的研究。

items.title: Prediction markets spark insider trading concerns. Here's how Goldman and other companies are responding
items.summary: CNBC reached out to 50 companies about what are their trading policies for employees on prediction markets. A handful had an answer.
items.title_zh: 预测市场引发内幕交易担忧。以下是高盛和其他公司的回应
items.summary_zh: CNBC 联系了 50 家公司，了解他们在预测市场上的员工交易政策。少数人给出了答案。

items.title: Kalshi traders think gas prices will stay higher for longer as U.S.-Iran tensions heat back up
items.summary: Odds that gas prices are above $3.50 on Election Day have jumped to 75% on the platform.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商认为，随着美伊紧张局势升温，天然气价格将在更长时间内保持较高水平
items.summary_zh: 在该平台上，选举日汽油价格高于 3.50 美元的可能性已跃升至 75%。

items.title: Goldman Sachs wins $70 billion in asset management deals with Verizon, Lockheed Martin
items.summary: Competition in the multitrillion-dollar market for retirement assets is fierce among managers such as Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, Russell Investments and Mercer.
items.title_zh: 高盛与 Verizon、Lockheed Martin 赢得 700 亿美元资产管理交易
items.summary_zh: 高盛、贝莱德、罗素投资和美世等管理公司在数万亿美元的退休资产市场上的竞争非常激烈。

items.title: Australian police reveal unseen photos 25 years after British backpacker murder
items.summary: Police hope the images could jog memories that will help them find the body of Peter Falconio.
items.title_zh: 英国背包客被谋杀25年后，澳大利亚警方公布了未公开的照片
items.summary_zh: 警方希望这些图像能够唤起人们的记忆，帮助他们找到彼得·法尔科尼奥的尸体。

items.title: US judge voids Donald Trump's $1.8bn settlement with IRS that gave him immunity from tax audits
items.summary: The judge said the suit was brought for 'improper purposes' and referred a Trump attorney for possible disciplinary action.
items.title_zh: 美国法官宣布唐纳德·特朗普 (Donald Trump) 与国税局 (IRS) 达成的 18 亿美元和解协议无效，该协议使他免受税务审计
items.summary_zh: 法官表示，提起诉讼是出于“不当目的”，并建议特朗普的律师采取可能的纪律处分。

items.title: Colombian national killed by ICE agent during operation in Maine
items.summary: It comes less than a week after an undocumented migrant was fatally shot in Houston by an immigration agent.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚国民在缅因州行动期间被 ICE 特工杀害
items.summary_zh: 不到一周前，一名无证移民在休斯敦被移民代理枪杀。

items.title: Identity of Sydney daycare worker facing 329 child abuse offences revealed
items.summary: Hamish Tait is accused of abusing 136 children at five childcare facilities over a 16-year period.
items.title_zh: 面临 329 起虐待儿童罪行的悉尼日托工作者身份被曝光
items.summary_zh: 哈米什·泰特 (Hamish Tait) 被指控在 16 年间在 5 个托儿所虐待了 136 名儿童。

items.title: Bison rams grandfather in Yellowstone Park, knocking him metres into the air
items.summary: The man and his grandson appeared a safe distance away from the bison before it quickly chased them down.
items.title_zh: 野牛在黄石公园撞倒祖父，将他撞到几米高的空中
items.summary_zh: 这名男子和他的孙子出现在距离野牛安全距离的地方，随后野牛迅速追赶了他们。

items.title: US burrito giant Chipotle opening first outlet in Mexico
items.summary: Other US fast food brands have struggled to succeed in the countries their dishes originated.
items.title_zh: 美国卷饼巨头 Chipotle 在墨西哥开设第一家门店
items.summary_zh: 其他美国快餐品牌在其菜肴的起源国一直难以取得成功。

items.title: Hungary parliament votes to remove president from office
items.summary: Tamás Sulyok was widely seen as a loyalist of former prime minister Viktor Orbán, who lost power in April after 16 years.
items.title_zh: 匈牙利议会投票罢免总统
items.summary_zh: 塔马斯·苏廖克被广泛视为前总理欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orbán) 的忠实拥护者，欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orbán) 在 16 年后于 4 月失去权力。

items.title: U.K. to Change Law to Allow Deportation of ‘Grooming Gang’ Leader
items.summary: The British government on Monday laid out steps enabling the deportation to Pakistan of Shabir Ahmed, the leader of a gang that raped dozens of girls in Northern England.
items.title_zh: 英国将修改法律允许驱逐“诱骗团伙”头目
items.summary_zh: 英国政府周一制定了措施，将沙比尔·艾哈迈德驱逐到巴基斯坦，他是英格兰北部强奸数十名女孩的团伙头目。

items.title: Residents of Spanish Towns Caught in Fierce Blazes Recount Harrowing Escapes
items.summary: Many say communication was chaotic and even nonexistent as flames tore through the area, taking 12 lives in one of the deadliest wildfires on record in Spain.
items.title_zh: 陷入大火的西班牙城镇居民讲述悲惨的逃生经历
items.summary_zh: 许多人表示，火势席卷整个地区，通讯十分混乱，甚至根本不存在，这是西班牙有记录以来最致命的野火之一，造成 12 人死亡。

items.title: The Netherlands Pushes to Make Manure a Hotter Product
items.summary: The Netherlands has been trying to figure out what to do with manure it can no longer use thanks to environmental rules. Volatile fertilizer costs may help.
items.title_zh: 荷兰推动粪便成为更热门的产品
items.summary_zh: 荷兰一直在试图弄清楚如何处理由于环境规则而无法再使用的粪便。化肥成本波动可能会有所帮助。

items.title: How Trump Failed to Secure the Strait of Hormuz in His Iran Deal
items.summary: President Trump signed an agreement that Iran said gave it control of the waterway — and global energy supplies. Now, Iran’s military is violently asserting authority.
items.title_zh: 特朗普为何未能在伊朗协议中确保霍尔木兹海峡的安全
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统签署了一项协议，伊朗称该协议使其控制了该水道以及全球能源供应。现在，伊朗军方正在暴力维护权威。

items.title: Binance.US CEO says exchange is rebuilding, eyes return to 20% U.S. market share
items.summary: Binance.US is betting ultra-low fees, new regulated products and deeper liquidity will help it regain customers after two years of regulatory setbacks.
items.title_zh: Binance.US首席执行官表示交易所正在重建，目标重回20%美国市场份额
items.summary_zh: Binance.US 认为，超低的费用、新的监管产品和更深的流动性将帮助其在经历两年的监管挫折后重新赢得客户。

items.title: Franklin Crypto CIO says crypto prices are disconnected from fundamentals
items.summary: Institutional adoption of crypto is accelerating even as digital asset prices fail to reflect the industry's strongest fundamentals in years, Seth Ginns said.
items.title_zh: Franklin Crypto 首席信息官表示，加密货币价格与基本面脱节
items.summary_zh: Seth Ginns 表示，尽管数字资产价格未能反映该行业多年来最强劲的基本面，但机构对加密货币的采用仍在加速。

items.title: Robinhood built a blockchain for tokenized stocks. Memecoins took over
items.summary: Robinhood Chain has pulled in $135 million of value and 800,000 addresses since July 1. Almost none of it is doing what the chain was built for.
items.title_zh: Robinhood 为代币化股票构建了区块链。 Memecoin 接管了
items.summary_zh: 自 7 月 1 日以来，Robinhood Chain 已吸引了 1.35 亿美元的价值和 80 万个地址。几乎没有一个地址在做该链的初衷。

items.title: Onchain Pokémon cards come to Solana-based DEX Jupiter
items.summary: While tokenized Pokémon cards aren’t new, having Jupiter enter the space could give the whole category a legitimacy boost.
items.title_zh: 链上神奇宝贝卡来到基于 Solana 的 DEX Jupiter
items.summary_zh: 虽然代币化的神奇宝贝卡并不新鲜，但木星的加入可能会提升整个类别的合法性。

items.title: UK lays out tokenized finance roadmap with projected £33 billion annual boost
items.summary: Industry leaders say payment infrastructure must evolve alongside tokenized assets to enable real-time settlement.
items.title_zh: 英国制定了代币化金融路线图，预计每年增加 330 亿英镑
items.summary_zh: 行业领导者表示，支付基础设施必须与代币化资产一起发展，以实现实时结算。

items.title: President Trump, White House press Senate to advance the Clarity Act while ethics fight looms
items.summary: President Trump and other key administration officials and lawmakers are making a renewed push to pass cryptocurrency legislation into law.
items.title_zh: 特朗普总统和白宫敦促参议院在道德斗争迫在眉睫的情况下推进《澄清法案》
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统和其他主要政府官员和立法者正在重新推动将加密货币立法纳入法律。

items.title: Chinese prosecutors call for more proactive approach to investigating crypto money laundering
items.summary: For the most part, China prohibits crypto trading and services while authorities actively investigate and prosecute crimes.
items.title_zh: 中国检察官呼吁采取更积极主动的方式调查加密货币洗钱活动
items.summary_zh: 在很大程度上，中国禁止加密货币交易和服务，而当局则积极调查和起诉犯罪行为。

items.title: Japan’s largest security token platform moves nearly $3 billion to Avalanche blockchain
items.summary: Progmat develops security token infrastructure that accounts for 64.6% of Japan’s security token market total issuance value.

items.summary_zh: Progmat 开发的证券型代币基础设施占日本证券型代币市场总发行额的 64.6%。

items.summary: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 现在是您最雄心勃勃的工作的合作伙伴

items.title_zh: 帮助 K-12 教育工作者培养实用的人工智能技能

items.title_zh: Hugging Face 和 Cerebras 将 Gemma 4 引入实时语音 AI

items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.

items.summary: Students from the MIT Cybersecurity Clinic help local governments and other vulnerable organizations defend against digital threats.

items.title: AI agents create virtual playgrounds to help robots get crucial training data

items.title: MIT in the media: Innovating and educating for the next 250 years of America
